loop_placements.notes: Slight deviation below mark but within acceptable range

confidence_rationale: Clear view of all three loop placements and cinching actions. Minor uncertainty in precise measurement of deviation on middle appendage due to viewing angle, but overall assessment is well-supported by visual evidence.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter measurement of deviation on appendage 2 - estimated from overhead view
technique_summary: Competent intermediate-level performance with systematic approach and consistent technique. Time of 110 seconds places this in the intermediate range (40-90s expert, 90-180s intermediate). Good instrument control and loop deployment throughout.
strengths: Appropriate tension application for secure cinching
No appendage transection or loop failures
improvement_suggestions: Focus on more precise placement to minimize deviation from marked lines
Work on speed to approach expert benchmark of under 90 seconds
Practice loop positioning to achieve consistent accuracy across all placements
